narrative:
Canaan (precinct in Madison County) has 1,630 registered voters, with 51.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.5 percentage points.
